title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Hexaware Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Hexaware Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Hexaware Technologies in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hexaware Technologies:
Hexaware Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies!
